title: The Witch: Part 2. The Other One
posterAlt: The Witch: Part 2. The Other One (2022) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A girl wakes up in a huge secret laboratory, then accidentally meets another girl who is trying to protect her house from a gang. The mystery girl overthrows the gang with her unexpected powers, and laboratory staff set out to find her.
synopsis: Released in 2022, The Witch: Part 2. The Other One is a action, mystery and thriller film from South Korea. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 18 certification (CH rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
